runtime.api: Java classes; no standalone REST contract recorded
runtime.version_status: must be reverified before any bridge release

taxonomy.bibliography_scope: full bibliographic references are outside the annotated NER scope
taxonomy.mapping_policy: preserve original labels and expose lossy mapping relations

data_and_model_access.described_sources: mixed availability; some require separate access

decision: Use GROBID-NER as a compatibility/provenance reference only; do not add it to the mandatory Rust or citation path.
